# zstack_vm_nic (Resource)

This resource allows you to manage VM NICs in ZStack. A VM NIC is a virtual network interface card that connects a virtual machine to an L3 network.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `l3_network_uuid` (String) The UUID of the L3 network.

### Optional

- `ip` (String) The IP address of the VM NIC. If not specified, ZStack will assign one automatically.

### Read-Only

- `gateway` (String) The gateway address of the VM NIC.
- `mac` (String) The MAC address of the VM NIC.
- `netmask` (String) The network mask of the VM NIC.
- `state` (String) The state of the VM NIC.
- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the VM NIC.
- `vm_instance_uuid` (String) The UUID of the VM instance this NIC belongs to.
